About the studio

Craftsmanship in every joint, line, and detail.

Home  /  About
Our story

From weekend builds to Trim Views.

My passion for building started long before Trim Views was ever a business. From a young age, I've always enjoyed working with my hands, creating things from scratch, and seeing a project come to life. After my wife and I remodeled our own home, friends online began to notice and wanted some of these features added to their home. So I began doing jobs on weekends while still working my 9-5 job as an insurance salesman. Eventually, the projects got larger and I was left with a decision to make. I could keep doing carpentry as a side hustle and keep the safety of a job, or take the leap into business ownership doing something more fulfilling.

That vision led me to start Trim Views. What began as a small carpentry business has grown into a company focused on creating custom interior spaces that make a lasting impact. Today, we specialize in custom built-ins, accent walls, fireplace features, ceiling details, and finish carpentry throughout Southwest Florida.

At the heart of every project is a simple goal: deliver exceptional craftsmanship, treat people right, and create spaces our clients are proud to show off for years to come.

How we work

Our process

A clear, considered path from first visit to final reveal.

01

Consultation

We visit your space, talk through your goals, and assess what is possible.

02

Design & Measure

Every profile and proportion is planned and measured to your room.

03

Craft & Install

Premium millwork is cut, fitted, and installed with precision.

04

Detailing & Reveal

Caulked, sanded, and finished to a clean, lasting result.

What we craft

A full range of custom carpentry.

  • Crown molding
  • Wainscoting & board-and-batten
  • Coffered & tray ceilings
  • Shiplap & tongue-and-groove
  • Custom built-ins & shelving
  • Feature & accent walls
